title: Assertion fault while renaming a table.
poc:
CREATE VIEW c AS SELECT NULL INTERSECT SELECT NULL ORDER BY
    likelihood(NULL, (d, (SELECT c)));
ALTER TABLE a RENAME TO e;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE renaming triggers assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE x(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO x(name, value) VALUES('test', NULL);
CREATE TABLE y(ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES x(id));
INSERT INTO y(ref_id) VALUES((SELECT id FROM x WHERE name='test'));
ALTER TABLE x RENAME TO z;
